HCSOBP_2023-2024: Percent of adults who reported a height and weight that yield a body mass index of 30 or greater.
HCSHYTP_2023-2024: Percent of adults who reported that a doctor, nurse or other health professional has diagnosed them with high blood pressure (excludes borderline high, pre-hypertensive or hypertension diagnosed only during pregnancy).
HCSDIAP_2023-2024: Percent of adults who reported that a doctor, nurse or other health professional has diagnosed them with diabetes (excludes pre-diabetes or diabetes only during pregnancy).
HCSATHP_2023-2024: Percent of adults who reported that a doctor, nurse or other health professional has diagnosed them with asthma, and they currently have asthma.
CCR_2017-2021: Annual diagnosis rate for all invasive cancers. Does not include pre-cancerous diagnoses such as breast cancer in situ or urinary cancer in situ. All ages, risk-adjusted.
VRLE_2023: The average number of years a person may expect to live.

HCSOBP_2023-2024: Chicago Department of Public Health, Healthy Chicago Survey
HCSHYTP_2023-2024: Chicago Department of Public Health, Healthy Chicago Survey
HCSDIAP_2023-2024: Chicago Department of Public Health, Healthy Chicago Survey
HCSATHP_2023-2024: Chicago Department of Public Health, Healthy Chicago Survey
CCR_2017-2021: Illinois Department of Public Health, Illinois State Cancer Registry (Calculated by Metopio)
VRLE_2023: Illinois Department of Public Health, Death Certificate Data Files
